hero.title: Unlock Your
hero.subtitle: RendaBio is a multi-agent platform built for knowledge workers, boosting productivity in marketing, research, development, and other complex business scenarios.

features.title: Built for
features.subtitle: Integrating A2A + MCP dual protocols to build the next-generation multi-agent collaboration platform

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
multiAgent.description: Simulate real team division of labor, multiple specialized agents work together, automatically scheduling to complete complex tasks. Based on A2A protocol for efficient inter-agent communication.

superSearch.title: Super Search & Write
superSearch.description: From task decomposition, multi-source retrieval to structured generation, providing a full-chain search and writing workflow. Supports real-time information acquisition and deep research.

verification.title: Real-time Verification
verification.description: Multi-agent cross-verification, fact-checking, effectively suppressing hallucinations, ensuring accurate and reliable output. All conclusions are traceable to sources.

agents.title: Expert Agents
agents.subtitle: Each agent is a domain expert, working together to complete complex tasks

teamo.name: Teamo
teamo.description: Responsible for task scheduling and team management, monitoring execution status, and reporting progress in a timely manner

workflow.title: Five Simple Steps
workflow.subtitle: No learning curve required, collaborate like working with a real human team

1.title: Input Task

marketResearch.title: Market Research & Industry Analysis

contentCreation.description: Automatically plan, research, and draft professional copy or academic papers. Full AI assistance from creative conception to final draft.
